# Wave 53 Plan — Injection Completions + Command Upgrades

**Date:** 2026-04-17
**Status:** 🚀 Active

## User Request
Implement Wave 53: complete the Wave 51 injection work (@git:, @cmd:, @gh:) and add /tldr, smart /retry qualifiers. Also fix W52-3 (mini-model gate).

## Target Outcome
- `@git:staged|HEAD|log|status` injects live git data into prompts
- `@cmd:<shell-command>` executes allowlisted commands and injects output
- `@gh:<owner/repo#N>` injects issue/PR data from GitHub
- `/tldr` summarizes last response in 3 bullets
- `/retry shorter|simpler|code|bullet|<text>` modifies the retry prompt
- Mini-model fast-path extended to `balanced` profile (not just `copilot-first`)

## File Ownership (NO OVERLAP)

**Han owns:**
- `src/openclaw_cli_path_utils.py` (add _detect_git_refs, _detect_cmd_refs, _detect_gh_refs)
- `src/openclaw_cli.py` — injection processing section only (process_refs loop ~line 4900-5000)

**Yoda owns:**
- `src/openclaw_cli_cmd_misc.py` (add /tldr, extend /retry)
- `src/model_routing_policy.py` (W52-3: extend mini-model gate to balanced profile)
- `src/openclaw_cli.py` — command dispatch section only (slash command elif chains)
- `tests/` — any tests for /tldr, /retry qualifiers, mini-gate

**Neither may touch:** each other's file boundaries.
